race.description: Stradbroke Season On Sale Now Plate (C2)
race.comment: HOT MAJESTY (4) got a well-deserved win at the Gold Coast last time out and will have taken a bunch of confidence from that victory. Gets some weight relief with the 2kg claim and will be right there at the business end. KOOLIBAH (14) appreciated the step-up in trip at the latest effort with a dominant win over this course and distance. Winning hoop Thompson stays in the stirrups and can make it back-to-back. TRUMP CARD (8) returned in good order with a solid Ipswich win and will have come on with that run now under the belt. Must be respected. The well-related GALWAY FLYER (9) (half to G2 winner Kirwan's Lane) placed over this course and distance last time out and rates among the leading hopes. ROCK THE SUNRISE (6) next in line from the inside marble.
